name: Double Chocolate Pudding Pie
recipeIngredient: Fat free instant pudding & pie filling (4-serving size)
8 oz Cool Whip Lite Topping, thawed, divided
1 Keebler reduced fat graham cracker pie crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour 3/4 cup of milk into a medium bowl. Add Devil's Food flavor pudding mix. Beat with a wire whisk for one minute. (The mixture will be thick.)
2. Gently stir in half of the Cool Whip. Spoon evenly into the crust.
3. Pour the remaining 3/4 cup of milk into another medium bowl. Add White Chocolate flavor pudding mix. Beat with a wire whisk for one minute. (The mixture will be thick.)
4. Gently stir in the remaining Cool Whip. Spread over the pudding layer in the crust.
5. Refrigerate for 4 hours or until set. Garnish, if desired.
6. Store leftover pie in the refrigerator. Makes 8 servings. Per serving: 270 calories and 7 grams fat.
